Interface IRPCXform

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control a RPC transform.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("FBFC2EEA-2177-48E2-B79B-5451FB6FD123")]
public interface IRPCXform : IGeodataXform
